heading: Ground-based analog capabilities
label: 70503 Ground-based analog capabilities
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70503.42 U.S.C. 16764, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title V, § 504119 Stat. 2929Dec. 30, 2005
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70503.42 U.S.C. 16764, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title V, § 504119 Stat. 2929Dec. 30, 2005

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Administrator may establish a ground-based analog capability in remote United States locations in order to assist in the development of lunar operations, life support, and in-situ resource utilization experience and capabilities.
have significant temperature extremes and range; and
have access to energy and natural resources (including geothermal, permafrost, volcanic, or other potential resources).

children.heading: .—Involvement of Local Populations and Private Sector Partners
children.label: c .—Involvement of Local Populations and Private Sector Partners
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Administrator shall involve local populations, academia, and industrial partners as much as possible to ensure that ground-based benefits and applications are encouraged and developed.
